summary: Mediocre recording of a typically sloppy, lackluster 1994 show
review: Reviewers describe this concert as a typical sloppy and lackluster performance for the band in ’94, offering little enthusiasm for the music. No specific comments about the recording source or sound quality are provided, leaving its technical fidelity unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (3 ★) notes a poor‑quality performance with no recording details; the rating reflects a below‑average show and uncertain audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer mentions the overall show as sloppy and lackluster without highlighting any particular set structure.
